The Storyteller

Sabarivaasan Shanmugam
Screenwriter · Lyricist · Director

"Trained under Balu Mahendra — he carries the soul and grace of every frame he writes."

Sabarivaasan Shanmugam is a screenwriter, lyricist, and director rooted deeply in the heart of Tamil cinema. A disciple of the legendary cinematographer-director Balu Mahendra, he brings a profoundly humanistic vision to every story he tells.

His dialogues for the critically acclaimed KD engira Karuppudurai were celebrated by audiences and critics alike, earning him the Ananda Vikatan Cinema Award for Best Dialogue Writer 2019.

From Amazon Prime to Sony LIV to Jio Hotstar, from Yuvan Shankar Raja to Aditya Ravindran — Sabarivaasan writes with both precision and passion. His short films have swept 27 national and international awards, with selections across Italy, the UK, Singapore, and the USA.
